preserve_verbatim.item: Exactly one skill, one branch, one PR, one green merge at a time.
Run validate-skill-dod.py and validate-skill-scripts.py before PR.

compressed_summary.description: The active skill was hardened with deterministic assets, evals, examples, prompts, templates, knowledge, and scripts.

open_questions.description: PR URL is unknown until the PR is created.

risks.description: Remote CI cannot be verified before PR creation.

validation.evidence: Valid fixtures passed and negative fixtures failed.

rehydration_prompt: Repo: /Users/deonto/Documents/workspace/jm-adk-alfa. Branch: codex/harden-pre-compact-context-dod-20260606. Objective: finish pre-compact-context hardening. Next action: rerun local validations and open PR if clean.

guardian_decision.rationale: P0 context and rehydration prompt are complete.
